evidence: Deterministic gate: npm run build, npm run check, npm test all exit 0 (209 pass). Runtime demonstration on built dist via pi -p --mode json -e <tree>/packages/pi-behavior-monitors/dist/index.js: inherit arm - session model deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash, no yaml pin, hedge trace session_start recorded model deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash with full classify round-trip (steer delivered); pin arm - scratch cwd .pi/agents yaml pinning deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro under the same session model, trace recorded deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro. Fresh adversarial probe confirmed dist carries the inherit branch, the old bare error string has exactly one (suffixed) occurrence, no call site requires a yaml model, and both README/CHANGELOG surfaces are current. Orchestrator independently re-read both trace files.

yaml pin overrides session model (trace evidence)
